case_title: FANYA YOUNG VS. MXB PARTNERS, LLC DBA THE BATTERY

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION RE: REQUEST TO APPEAR AT HEARING BY ZOOM FILED BY PLAINTIFF YOUNG, FANYA
REQUEST TO AMEND PARTY NAME BEFORE THE HEARING -CHANGE TO FIONA REYNOLDS FILED BY PLAINTIFF YOUNG, FANYA AS TO DEFENDANT DOE (UNKNOWN), JANE

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF YOUNG, FANYA RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT MXB PARTNERS, LLC DBA THE BATTERY $500.00 PRINCIPAL, $177.75 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $677.75, SEE ATTACHED MC-025 THE CASES AGAINST DEFENDANTS JOSE VILLAREAL AND JANE DOE ARE DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE. REMARK: DEFENDANTS EXHIBITS RECD AT WINDOW
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (FEE FOR SERVICE:$102.75) SERVED JUN-16-2022, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT MXB PARTNERS, LLC DBA THE BATTERY

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JUL-08-2022 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JUL-08-2022 BY MICHELLE TONG. PLAINTIFF FANYA YOUNG IS PRESENT VIA ZOOM. DEFENDANT MXB PARTNERS, LLC DBA THE BATTERY IS PRESENT REPRESENTED BY FRANK KAWECKI, GENERAL MANAGER. DEFENDANT JUAN VILLAREAL, BAR DIRECTOR IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT JANE DOE IS NOT PRESENT. DEFENDANT'S WITNESSES INCLUDE: FIONA REYNOLDS, RESTAURANT DIRECTOR; AVRAM WALDEN, I.T. DIRECTOR; SUSAN CANLI, ESQ; THE COURT OBTAINED THE NAMES AND PHONE NUMBERS OF 3 ADDITIONAL WITNESSES AND ADMONISHED ALL PARTIES NOT TO SPEAK TO THEM ABOUT THESE PROCEEDINGS PRIOR TO THE COURT'S INVESTIGATION. THE PLAINTIFF DISMISSES HER CASE AGAINST THE DEFENDANT INDIVIDUALS, JUAN VILLAREAL AND JANE DOE. THE COURT AMENDS THE DEFENDANT NAME TO MXB BATTERY OPERATIONS, LP DBA THE BATTERY. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. PRIOR TO THE HEARING HONORABLE MICHELLE TONG GAVE DISCLOSURE ABOUT CAMPAIGN CONTRIBUTIONS MADE. JUDGE: MICHELLE TONG; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
ORDER GRANTING WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68634 (E), CRC 3.52 AS TO PLAINTIFF YOUNG, FANYA

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAY-18-2022 - CONTINUED COURT'S OWN MOTION TO JUL-08-2022 AT 8:30 AM IN DEPT. 506, DUE TO THE UNAVAILABILITY OF A JUDICIAL OFFICER TO HEAR TODAY'S MATTER. NO APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF. PLAINTIFF PREVIOUSLY NOTIFIED BY TELEPHONE OF THIS CONTINUANCE ON 5-17-22. DEFENDANT MXB PARTNERS, LLC DBA THE BATTERY, REPRESENTED BY FRANK KAWACKI, GENERAL MANAGER IS PRESENT. NO OTHER APPEARANCES ARE MADE. NOTICE OF CONTINUANCE IS PROVIDED TO DEFENDANT. (506)
